summary: TriniSaver MVP - Initial Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). All core features working correctly including auth, products, stores, price reports with points system, unit price comparison, mocked trip planner with evening rush warnings, leaderboard, savings summary, profile updates, and gas stations. Frontend mobile UI renders correctly on all 5 tabs with proper navigation.

minor.issue: JWT secret key is 30 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256). Backend logs show InsecureKeyLengthWarning.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, should use 'boxShadow' for React Native Web compatibility
Console warnings: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode'
Package version warnings for @react-native-async-storage/async-storage (3.0.1 vs expected 2.2.0) and expo-image-picker (55.0.12 vs expected ~17.0.10)

action_items: Optional: Increase JWT_SECRET to 32+ bytes to remove warning
Optional: Update deprecated shadow* style props to boxShadow for better React Native Web compatibility
Optional: Update package versions (@react-native-async-storage, expo-image-picker) to match Expo SDK expectations
Optional: Fix Image resizeMode prop usage
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All backend API endpoints return proper status codes and exclude MongoDB _id
✅ Auth flow (register, login, JWT validation) working correctly
✅ Points system working: 5 points for manual report, 10 points for photo report
✅ Unit price comparison correctly normalizes to 100g base unit for fair comparison
✅ Trip planner mocked traffic data works, evening_rush correctly warns users about heavy traffic
✅ All frontend screens use proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ Tab navigation (Expo Router) working correctly across all 5 screens
✅ Mobile-first responsive design working well on 375x667 viewport
✅ Environment variables properly used (no hardcoded URLs)
⚠️ Minor: Some console warnings about deprecated styles (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Backend database was already seeded with 10 T&T stores, 16 products, 8 sample price reports, 5 gas stations. Frontend testing created 1 test user (test_frontend_84111@trinisaver.tt) for integration testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP features tested and working. Backend APIs return correct data structures. Frontend mobile UI renders properly with full tab navigation. Auth flow end-to-end verified. Mocked APIs (traffic, gas stations) working as expected. Only minor console warnings about deprecated style props remain.

auth.test_login_existing_user: PASSED - Login successful with valid credentials
auth.test_get_auth_me: PASSED - Returns user profile with Bearer token, password_hash excluded

price_reports.test_create_price_report_with_points: PASSED - Report created, 5 points awarded, user points updated
price_reports.test_get_recent_price_reports: PASSED - 5 recent reports returned, photo_base64 excluded

unit_price_comparison.test_compare_unit_prices: PASSED - Correctly normalizes to 100g base unit, sorts by cheapest, PriceSmart at $1.6/100g is cheapest

trip_planner.test_evening_rush_warning: PASSED - Evening rush: Heavy traffic, is_peak=True, is_worth_it=False, warning message displayed

community.test_get_leaderboard_all_regions: PASSED - 10 users ranked by points, password_hash excluded
community.test_leaderboard_region_filter: PASSED - Region filter works, returns only North users

savings_profile.test_get_savings_summary: PASSED - Returns total_reports, estimated_savings_ttd, points, this_month data
savings_profile.test_update_profile_settings: PASSED - Region updated to South, is_pricesmart_member=True, changes persisted

gas_stations.test_get_gas_stations_mocked: PASSED - 5 stations returned with T&T brands (NP, Unipet)

frontend_tests.test_1_auth_screen: PASSED - Email, password inputs, submit and toggle buttons present
frontend_tests.test_2_signup_toggle: PASSED - Name input and region selector visible after toggle
frontend_tests.test_3_user_registration: PASSED - User registered successfully, redirected to dashboard
frontend_tests.test_4_home_dashboard: PASSED - Bento grid with savings summary, quick actions visible
frontend_tests.test_5_tab_navigation: PASSED - All 5 tabs (Home, Compare, Scan, Community, Profile) working
frontend_tests.test_6_compare_screen: PASSED - Form elements and trip planner toggle present
frontend_tests.test_7_community_screen: PASSED - Leaderboard with region filters displayed
frontend_tests.test_8_profile_screen: PASSED - User info, PriceSmart toggle, region selector, theme toggle present
